titleStmt.title: SII 15.196: original edition by P. B. Desai, Dines Chandra Sircar and G. S. Gai
No. 195. (B.K. No. 7 of 1930-31.) IṄGAḶĒŚVAR, BAGEVADI TALUK, BIJAPUR DISTRICT.

summary.p: On a slab built into the east wall of the Nārāyaṇadēva temple.

This is dated Śaka 1 • • •, Krōdhana, Mārgaśira ba. 10, Friday, Saṅkramaṇa. The year Krōdhana falling during the reign of Mahādēva, occurred in Śaka 1187. But in this year the given details of the date do not agree. The said tithi corresponds to 1265 A.D., December 3, the week-day being Thursday. There was no Saṅkramaṇa on this day.

It registers the gift of land, a shop and an oil-mill by the Two Five-hundred (Mahājanas) of Iṅgaḷēśvara to the god Gōpīnātha of Ūroḍegēri. Other gifts to the same deity by Telliga-ayvattokkalu, Vimchuva-Basavarasa, the Suṅkādhikāri of Taddavāḍi Thousand, etc., are also registered. Iṅgaḷēśvara is described as the foremost Baṇaṅjupaṭṭaṇa of Taddavāḍi Thousand, and is said to be an agrahāra donated by Janamējaya and called Dakshiṇa-Vāraṇāsi.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
© śrī gōpīnāthaśaraṇu . namaḥstuṁgaśiraścuṁbicaṁdracāmaracāravē trailōkyanaga
rāraṁbhamūlastaṁbhāya śaṁbhavē . śrīmadu vidyādharēṁdrōragasuranu
ta śrīpādapaṁkējaraṁmyōddāmaṁ kṣīrābdhivāsaṁ surabhuviruhamaṁ neṁmi traibhaṁgi yōṣṭa
moṟuṁ lōkamaṁ rakṣisalu mudadivēṇnādanuṁ māḷpa lakṣmīdhāmaṁ gōpāḷakriṣṇaṁ
salahuvaneraḍainū¨rvvaraṁ prēmediṁdaṁ . karamesadippa taddavāḍi sāsiradādiba
ṇaṁjuvaṭṭaṇaṁ sirige nivāsa dēsiya tava¨rmmane dakṣiṇavāraṇāsi sauṁdarasura
saiḷa sāsanagrihaṁ negaḷduttamadagrahāraśēkharasameyakke sōbhipa sikhāmaṇi
ḍisuviṁgaḷēsvaraṁ . vara saudha¨rmmacatu¨rvvidhādipuruṣā¨rththakkāgara¨rssatvasāgararaṁ
bōdhiparītedhātrigesavī kī¨rttyaṁganāvallabha¨rggurudēvadvijabhaktaruttamacatu¨rvvē [dā¨rttha]
saṁpannarapparaḍainū¨rvvaru cāgabhōgadayeyiṁdiṁtoppida¨rddhātriyoḷu [.]
śrīmadu yādavāṁnvayada bhillama bhūbhujanātmasaṁbha
vaṁ bhūmigadhīśa jaitugigetattanujaṁ kadanatriṇētranuddhāmabhujapratāparipubhūpaku
ḷāṁtaka viṣṇumū¨rtti saṁgrāmadoḷāṁpa vairigajakēsari siṁghaṇarāyanoppi
daṁ . śrī siṁghaṇātmajaṁ dhātrīśaṁ jaitugitanūbhavaṁ kaṁnarabhūmīśananu
jaṁ samastō¨rbbīśaṁ mahadēvarāyanesadaṁ dhareyoḷū . svasti śrīmatu yādavanārā
yaṇaṁ bhujabaḷa pratāpacakrava¨rtti śrī mahadēvarāyaṁ śrī madurāyarājadhā
ni dēvagiriyoḷu sukhasaṁkathāvinōdadiṁ rājyaṁgeyvuttamire . © svasti śrī sakava¨rṣa 1
neya krōdhana saṁvatsarada mā¨rggasira ba 10 sukravāra saṁkramāṇa byatīpātha
mahātithiyaṁdū . vri . bharatana vaṁśajāta janamējayabhūbhujadatti yiṁgaḷē
svaraderaḍainū¨rba¨rssakaḷadha¨rmmamumaṁ pratipāḷisuttamī dhareyanurāgadiṁ pogaḷalū
roḍegēriya gōpīnāthadēvarigesavaṁgabhōga vararaṁgada bhōgamanī dharitriyoḷū [.]
kaṁ . śaṣiraviyuḷḷina naḍevaṁtosadūroḍegērigadhiparai nū¨rvvarane sama¨rppisidhārāpū[¨rvva]
kadiṁdosaditta¨rddha¨rmadesava dātārikeyaṁ . śrīmaderaḍainū¨rvvaru vūroḍe
gēriya śrī gōpīnāthadēvarige koṭṭa vrittiyeṁteṁdaḍe . mahāsragdhare .
taradiṁdaṁ chatrageygaṁ baḍagalesava dyōṇūra sīmāḷiyiṁdoppire mū
ḍalpū¨rbbadiṁ muṁpariduvesadihā dōṇiyiṁ teṁkalaṁ tāḷdi
re mūlasthānageygaṁ paḍuvaleseve mūvatteraḍgēṇo 32 ḷaṁ matta
ru tānappattamūṟī 73 baḍagaṇa holadoḷgōpīnāthaṁge māṁnya
vararājabīdiyiṁdoppire paḍuvalu mūḍavāgilaṁgaḍi taradiṁdire teṁ
kadesage modalāgire gōpīnāthadēvaraṁgaḍiyesaguṁ . sirivāgiliṁda baḍagalu
moppuva kallagāṇavācaṁdrā¨rkkaṁbara naḍavutire tāvittaru gōpīnāthadēvageraḍainū
¨rbbaru . śrī varadagōpīnāthaṁge vūrina talligayvattokkalu naṁdādīvigege
paḷigeyeṇneya tāvanunayadiṁdamittarācaṁdrā¨rkkaṁ . śrīmadiṁgaḷēsvara
deraḍainū¨rvvara samakṣadalu taddavāḍi sāsirada suṁkādhikāri viṁcuva basavarasa
nu sāḷavāḍigeya nālkuṁbaḷada prabhugaḷige sahiraṇyamaṁ koṭṭu yā sā
ḷavāḍigeya paḍuvaṇa holadoḷage śrī nīlamēśvaradēvara keyyiṁ paḍuvalu
cakana bhāviya dāriyiṁ baḍagalu yaṁtalli mattaru 16 maṁ sa¨rvvanamaśya dhārāpū¨rvvaka vāga
redu vūroḍegēriya śrīgōpīnāthadēva¨rgge koṭṭanu . śrīmanmaudgalagōtrōddā
rasanātmasati mallalegaṁ śrī mahimā¨rṇava suṁburanāmada cauḍarasa
si jaśamaṁ paḍedaṁ . dharegesayalsuṁbuga cauḍarasaṁ gōpāḷadēvaraṁ māḍisi tedvarada
pālisiyeṁdiradūroḍegērigadhipa nū¨rvvarigittaṁ . priyadiṁdiṁtidaneyde kāva
puruṣaṁgāyuṁ mahāśrīyumakku yidaṁ kāyade kāyva pāpige ku
rukṣētrō¨rvviyoḷu vāraṇāśiyoḷekkōṭi munīṁdraraṁ kavileyaṁ vēdā
ḍyaraṁ koṁdadoṁdayaśaṁ sā¨rggumideṁdu sāṟidapudī saiḷākṣaraṁ dhātriyoḷu . ka .
gurucarita sadāśivacaraṇāṁbujabhriṁga haritagōtrōdbhavanoppiralī śāsanaga
bbama viracisidaṁ gōpīrājaniḷegiṁtesadaṁ . śrīmadēkādaśāvatārayōgicakrava¨rtti
caritaprakāśaprabhuve śaraṇu . yī dha¨rmmamanācaṁdrā¨rkkatāraṁbaraṁ śrīmaderaḍai nū[¨rvvaru]
pratipāḷisuvaru maṁgaḷa mahā śrī śrī śrī . Ī śāsanamaṁ maṇigavaḷḷiya rebbōjana
maga kallōjanu boṁmōjana maga vāmōjanuṁ kaṁḍaḷisidaru . śrī gōpīnātha śara [ṇu .]
Digital edition of SII 15.196 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
